article_title: Xanadu Clears Final Shareholder Vote to Become the First Publicly Traded Photonic Quantum Computing Company

content_preview.title: Xanadu Clears Final Shareholder Vote to Become the First Publicly Traded Photonic Quantum Computing Company
content_preview.summary: Crane Harbor shareholders approve SPAC merger with Xanadu Quantum Technologies, clearing the way for a $3.6 billion Nasdaq and TSX listing under ticker XNDU on March 27.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Shareholders of Crane Harbor Acquisition Corp. voted on March 19 to approve all proposals necessary to complete a business combination with Toronto-based Xanadu Quantum Technologies Inc., according to a [joint announcement via GlobeNewswire](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/03/19/3259437/0/en/Crane-Harbor-Acquisition-Corp-Shareholders-Approve-Business-Combination-with-Xanadu-Quantum-Technologies-Inc.html). The transaction is expected to close on March 26, with shares ...

editor_notes.source_verification: GlobeNewswire press release confirms shareholder approval on March 19, expected close March 26, XNDU ticker on Nasdaq/TSX starting March 27, CEO Weedbrook quote verified. The Quantum Insider confirms $302M gross proceeds, PIPE financing details, and CAD$390M Project OPTIMISM negotiations.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All key financial figures verified: $3B pre-money equity, $3.6B pro forma market cap, $3.1B enterprise value, $302M gross proceeds, $275M PIPE at $10/share. PIPE investor names confirmed via CNBC source. Internal cross-references to D-Wave and neutral-atom quantum articles are appropriate.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and informative. Technical explanation of photonic approach is accessible without oversimplification. 'What We Don't Know' section properly flags redemption uncertainty and competitive positioning questions.
editor_notes.originality: Good contextualization within the broader quantum computing market, comparing Xanadu's valuation and approach against IonQ, D-Wave, and Rigetti. The photonic technology explanation adds genuine editorial value.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Well-sourced news article covering a significant quantum computing milestone. Four sources including primary press release and CNBC provide strong foundation. Appropriate length at 745 words for News category.
